$description: Component tokens — Tailwind class mappings per theme/mode. Used by useBrutalTheme() hook.

barber.dark: bg-gradient-to-r from-accent-gold to-accent-goldHover text-black font-bold border border-white/10 shadow-gold hover:brightness-110 active:scale-[0.97] transition-all duration-300
barber.light: bg-gradient-to-r from-accent-gold to-accent-goldHover text-black font-bold border border-black/10 shadow-gold hover:brightness-110 active:scale-[0.97] transition-all duration-300

beauty.dark: bg-gradient-to-r from-beauty-neon to-beauty-acid text-white font-bold border border-white/20 shadow-neon hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98] transition-all duration-300
beauty.light: bg-gradient-to-r from-beauty-neon to-beauty-acid text-white font-bold border border-purple-200/30 shadow-neon hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98] transition-all duration-300

barber.dark: bg-transparent border-transparent text-accent-gold hover:bg-white/5 transition-all duration-300
barber.light: bg-transparent border-transparent text-accent-gold hover:bg-black/5 transition-all duration-300

beauty.dark: bg-transparent border-transparent text-beauty-neon hover:bg-white/5 transition-all duration-300
beauty.light: bg-transparent border-transparent text-beauty-neon hover:bg-purple-500/5 transition-all duration-300

barber.dark: bg-red-500/10 text-red-400 border border-red-500/20 hover:bg-red-500/20 transition-all duration-300
barber.light: bg-red-500/8 text-red-600 border border-red-500/15 hover:bg-red-500/15 transition-all duration-300

beauty.dark: bg-red-500/20 text-red-300 border border-red-500/20 hover:bg-red-500/30 transition-all duration-300
beauty.light: bg-red-500/8 text-red-600 border border-red-500/15 hover:bg-red-500/15 transition-all duration-300

barber.dark: bg-white/5 text-text-primary border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all duration-300
barber.light: bg-black/5 text-neutral-800 border border-black/10 hover:bg-black/8 transition-all duration-300

beauty.dark: bg-white/10 text-white border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-sm transition-all duration-300
beauty.light: bg-purple-500/8 text-purple-900 border border-purple-200/30 hover:bg-purple-500/12 transition-all duration-300
